steps.title: Set up the intercept
steps.content: The $x$-intercept of $y=g(x)$ occurs where $y=0$, so solve $\frac{5}{8}x-30=0$.

steps.title: Solve for the value
steps.content: Adding $30$ and multiplying by $\frac{8}{5}$ gives $$x=\frac{8}{5}\cdot 30=48.$$ The answer is 48.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $48$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $48$.
